title: phaseolus vulgaris var. jodomelas
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. jodomelas, also known as the yellow wax bean, is a variety of the common bean plant, which is a type of legume native to the Americas. The yellow wax bean has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the yellow wax bean include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. In herbal preparations, the yellow wax bean is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a garnish in salads.
